# Portfolio
My portfolio
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>Jonathan Ivan Hamdani &mdash; Actuarial &amp; Business</title>
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Syne:wght@700;800&family=DM+Sans:opsz,wght@9..40,300;9..40,400;9..40,500&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
:root{
  --bg:#050508;--bg2:#0a0a0f;--surf:#0f0f16;--surf2:#16161f;
  --bd:rgba(255,255,255,.07);--bdw:rgba(255,130,40,.28);
  --tx:#F0F0F0;--txs:#7A7A86;--txd:#3A3A48;
  --a:#FF5820;--a2:#FF8C4B;--glow:rgba(255,88,32,.18);
  --fd:'Syne',sans-serif;--fb:'DM Sans',sans-serif;
  --ease:cubic-bezier(.16,1,.3,1);
}
*,*::before,*::after{margin:0;padding:0;box-sizing:border-box;cursor:none}
html{scroll-behavior:smooth;background:var(--bg);color:var(--tx);font-family:var(--fb);overflow-x:hidden}
body{overflow-x:hidden;-webkit-font-smoothing:antialiased}
img{display:block;max-width:100%}
a{color:inherit;text-decoration:none}

.cd{position:fixed;top:0;left:0;width:10px;height:10px;background:var(--a);border-radius:50%;transform:translate(-50%,-50%);pointer-events:none;z-index:99999;transition:width .3s var(--ease),height .3s var(--ease)}
.cr{position:fixed;top:0;left:0;width:44px;height:44px;border:1.5px solid rgba(255,255,255,.28);border-radius:50%;transform:translate(-50%,-50%);pointer-events:none;z-index:99998;transition:opacity .3s}
body.hov .cd{width:50px;height:50px;background:var(--tx);mix-blend-mode:difference}
body.hov .cr{opacity:0}

.grain{position:fixed;inset:-50%;width:200%;height:200%;pointer-events:none;z-index:99990;opacity:.028;
background-image:url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg viewBox='0 0 512 512' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cfilter id='n'%3E%3CfeTurbulence type='fractalNoise' baseFrequency='.75' numOctaves='4' stitchTiles='stitch'/%3E%3C/filter%3E%3Crect width='100%25' height='100%25' filter='url(%23n)'/%3E%3C/svg%3E");
animation:gs .5s steps(2) infinite}
@keyframes gs{0%{transform:translate(0,0)}25%{transform:translate(-2%,-1%)}50%{transform:translate(1%,2%)}75%{transform:translate(2%,-2%)}100%{transform:translate(-1%,1%)}}

.loader{position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:100000;background:var(--bg);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;animation:ldOut .5s var(--ease) 1.6s both;pointer-events:none}
@keyframes ldOut{to{opacity:0;visibility:hidden}}
.ld-inner{font-family:var(--fd);font-size:clamp(1.5rem,4vw,3rem);font-weight:700;letter-spacing:-.04em;overflow:hidden}
.ld-line{display:block;transform:translateY(110%);animation:slideUp .9s var(--ease) .15s forwards}
.ld-line b{color:var(--a);font-weight:inherit}
@keyframes slideUp{to{transform:translateY(0)}}

nav{position:fixed;top:0;width:100%;padding:1.8rem 6%;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;z-index:1000;border-bottom:1px solid transparent;transition:padding .4s var(--ease),background .4s,border-color .4s}
nav.pin{padding:1rem 6%;background:rgba(5,5,8,.92);backdrop-filter:blur(20px);border-bottom-color:var(--bd)}
.logo{font-family:var(--fd);font-size:1.1rem;font-weight:800;letter-spacing:-.06em;text-transform:uppercase}
.logo b{color:var(--a);font-weight:inherit}
.nav-links{display:flex;gap:2rem}
.nav-links a{font-size:.75rem;font-weight:500;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.14em;color:var(--txs);transition:color .3s;position:relative}
.nav-links a:hover{color:var(--tx)}
.nav-links a::after{content:'';position:absolute;bottom:-4px;left:0;width:0;height:1px;background:var(--a);transition:width .4s var(--ease)}
.nav-links a:hover::after{width:100%}
.nav-cta{padding:.55rem 1.4rem;border:1px solid var(--bdw);border-radius:100px;font-size:.75rem;font-weight:500;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.1em;color:var(--a);transition:background .3s,color .3s;white-space:nowrap}
.nav-cta:hover{background:var(--a);color:#fff}

.hero{min-height:100vh;display:flex;flex-direction:column;justify-content:center;position:relative;overflow:hidden;padding:0 6%}
.hbg{position:absolute;inset:0;z-index:0;background:var(--bg)}
.hbg::before{content:'';position:absolute;top:-10%;right:-5%;width:70vw;height:80vh;background:radial-gradient(ellipse at top right,rgba(255,88,32,.09),transparent 60%);pointer-events:none}
.hbg::after{content:'';position:absolute;bottom:-15%;left:-5%;width:50vw;height:60vh;background:radial-gradient(ellipse at bottom left,rgba(255,88,32,.05),transparent 65%);pointer-events:none}
.hdots{position:absolute;inset:0;z-index:1;background-image:radial-gradient(circle,rgba(255,255,255,.07) 1px,transparent 1px);background-size:40px 40px;mask-image:radial-gradient(ellipse 90% 90% at 50% 50%,black 20%,transparent 100%);pointer-events:none}
.hgrid{position:absolute;inset:0;z-index:2;background-image:linear-gradient(to right,rgba(255,255,255,.025) 1px,transparent 1px),linear-gradient(to bottom,rgba(255,255,255,.025) 1px,transparent 1px);background-size:80px 80px;pointer-events:none}
.hhline{position:absolute;top:50%;left:0;right:0;height:1px;background:linear-gradient(to right,transparent,rgba(255,88,32,.18),transparent);z-index:3;pointer-events:none}
.hero-inner{position:relative;z-index:4;display:grid;grid-template-columns:1.2fr .8fr;align-items:center;gap:4rem;padding-top:5rem}
.eyebrow{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:1rem;margin-bottom:2.5rem;opacity:0;transform:translateY(14px);animation:fup .8s var(--ease) 1.8s forwards}
.edot{width:7px;height:7px;background:var(--a);border-radius:50%;box-shadow:0 0 12px var(--a)}
.etxt{font-size:.76rem;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.22em;color:var(--txs)}
.hero-name{font-family:var(--fd);font-weight:800;font-size:clamp(4rem,9.5vw,10.5rem);line-height:.87;letter-spacing:-.05em;text-transform:uppercase}
.hn{display:block;overflow:hidden}
.hn span{display:block;transform:translateY(110%)}
.hn:nth-child(1) span{animation:fup 1.1s var(--ease) 1.9s forwards;color:#ffffff}
.hn:nth-child(2) span{animation:fup 1.1s var(--ease) 2.05s forwards;color:#FF5820}
.hn:nth-child(3) span{animation:fup 1.1s var(--ease) 2.2s forwards;color:rgba(255,255,255,.72)}
@keyframes fup{to{transform:translateY(0)}}
.hero-desc{margin-top:2.5rem;max-width:460px;font-size:1rem;line-height:1.82;color:var(--txs);text-align:justify;opacity:0;transform:translateY(14px);animation:fup .8s var(--ease) 2.4s forwards}
.hero-desc strong{color:var(--tx);font-weight:500}
.hero-actions{margin-top:2.8rem;display:flex;gap:1.2rem;align-items:center;opacity:0;transform:translateY(14px);animation:fup .8s var(--ease) 2.6s forwards}
.btn-p{padding:.85rem 2.2rem;background:var(--a);color:#fff;border-radius:100px;font-size:.85rem;font-weight:500;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.1em;transition:background .3s,box-shadow .3s,transform .3s var(--ease)}
.btn-p:hover{background:var(--a2);box-shadow:0 8px 30px var(--glow);transform:translateY(-2px)}
.btn-g{padding:.85rem 2.2rem;border:1px solid var(--bd);color:var(--txs);border-radius:100px;font-size:.85rem;font-weight:500;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.1em;transition:border-color .3s,color .3s}
.btn-g:hover{border-color:var(--txs);color:var(--tx)}
.hero-right{display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:flex-end;gap:2.5rem;opacity:0;transform:translateY(14px);animation:fup .8s var(--ease) 2.7s forwards}
.hero-badge{background:var(--surf);border:1px solid var(--bdw);border-radius:16px;padding:1.4rem 1.8rem;text-align:right;position:relative;overflow:hidden}
.hero-badge::before{content:'';position:absolute;inset:0;background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(255,88,32,.08),transparent 60%);pointer-events:none}
.badge-v{font-family:var(--fd);font-size:2.2rem;font-weight:800;color:var(--a);letter-spacing:-.04em}
.badge-l{font-size:.64rem;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.15em;color:var(--txs);margin-top:.3rem}
.hero-stats{display:flex;gap:2.5rem}
.sv{font-family:var(--fd);font-size:2rem;font-weight:800;letter-spacing:-.04em;color:var(--tx);text-align:right}
.sv b{color:var(--a);font-weight:inherit}
.sl{font-size:.68rem;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.14em;color:var(--txs);margin-top:.2rem;text-align:right}
.hero-scroll{position:absolute;bottom:2.5rem;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);z-index:5;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:.7rem;opacity:0;animation:fup .6s var(--ease) 3.1s forwards}
.hs-line{width:1px;height:48px;background:linear-gradient(to bottom,rgba(255,88,32,.8),transparent);animation:spulse 2s ease infinite}
.hs-txt{font-size:.58rem;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.28em;color:var(--txd)}
@keyframes spulse{0%,100%{opacity:.3}50%{opacity:1}}

.mband{width:100vw;overflow:hidden;background:var(--a);padding:1.5rem 0;transform:rotate(-1.5deg) scaleX(1.04);position:relative;z-index:5;box-shadow:0 0 80px var(--glow)}
.mtrack{display:flex;white-space:nowrap;animation:mscroll 22s linear infinite}
.mitem{font-family:var(--fd);font-size:1.4rem;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;color:#0a0408;padding:0 2rem;display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:1.5rem}
.mitem::after{content:'\2726';font-size:.9rem;opacity:.6}
@keyframes mscroll{from{transform:translateX(0)}to{transform:translateX(-50%)}}

.div-n{padding:6vh 6% 0;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:2rem}
.div-n-num{font-family:var(--fd);font-size:.7rem;letter-spacing:.3em;color:var(--a);text-transform:uppercase;white-space:nowrap}
.div-n-line{flex:1;height:1px;background:linear-gradient(to right,var(--bdw),var(--bd),transparent)}
.div-n-lbl{font-size:.68rem;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.22em;color:var(--txd);white-space:nowrap}
.div-s{margin:6vh 0 0;padding:0 6%;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:1.5rem}
.dsm{display:flex;gap:.5rem}
.dsm span{width:2px;height:26px;background:var(--a);transform:skewX(-20deg);display:block}
.dsm span:nth-child(2){opacity:.35}.dsm span:nth-child(3){opacity:.15}
.div-s-txt{font-family:var(--fd);font-size:.68rem;letter-spacing:.28em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--txd)}
.div-s-line{flex:1;height:1px;background:var(--bd)}
.div-glow{margin:6vh 0 0;height:1px;background:linear-gradient(to right,transparent 5%,var(--a) 35%,var(--a2) 65%,transparent 95%);opacity:.3}

.about{padding:5vh 6% 12vh;display:grid;grid-template-columns:.9fr 1.1fr;gap:6rem;align-items:center;position:relative}
.about::before{content:'';position:absolute;left:0;top:50%;transform:translateY(-50%);width:40%;height:90%;background:radial-gradient(ellipse at left,rgba(255,88,32,.06),transparent 70%);pointer-events:none}
.photo-wrap{position:relative}
.photo-frame{position:relative;border-radius:20px;overflow:hidden;box-shadow:0 0 0 1px var(--bd),0 40px 80px rgba(0,0,0,.5)}
.photo-frame::before{content:'';position:absolute;top:0;left:0;width:60px;height:60px;border-top:2px solid var(--a);border-left:2px solid var(--a);border-radius:18px 0 0 0;z-index:2}
.photo-frame::after{content:'';position:absolute;bottom:0;right:0;width:60px;height:60px;border-bottom:2px solid var(--a);border-right:2px solid var(--a);border-radius:0 0 18px 0;z-index:2}
.photo-img{width:100%;aspect-ratio:3/4;object-fit:cover;object-position:center 25%;display:block;filter:contrast(1.05) brightness(.95) saturate(.9)}
.photo-badge{position:absolute;bottom:-1rem;right:-1.5rem;background:var(--surf2);border:1px solid var(--bdw);border-radius:14px;padding:1rem 1.4rem;backdrop-filter:blur(16px);z-index:3;box-shadow:0 8px 32px rgba(0,0,0,.4)}
.pb-v{font-family:var(--fd);font-size:1.6rem;font-weight:800;color:var(--a);letter-spacing:-.03em}
.pb-l{font-size:.62rem;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.14em;color:var(--txs);margin-top:.3rem}
.about-tag{font-size:.72rem;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.22em;color:var(--a);margin-bottom:1.8rem}
.about-h{font-family:var(--fd);font-size:clamp(2rem,3.5vw,3.5rem);font-weight:800;letter-spacing:-.04em;line-height:1.06}
.about-h b{color:var(--a);font-weight:inherit}
.about-body{margin-top:2rem;font-size:1rem;line-height:1.85;color:var(--txs);text-align:justify}
.about-body strong{color:var(--tx);font-weight:500}
.pills{margin-top:2.5rem;display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:.7rem}
.pill{padding:.4rem 1rem;border:1px solid var(--bd);border-radius:100px;font-size:.75rem;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.1em;color:var(--txs);transition:border-color .3s,color .3s}
.pill:hover{border-color:var(--a);color:var(--a)}

/* ACHIEVEMENTS */
.ach-section{padding:0 6% 10vh}
.sc{border-radius:20px;border:1px solid var(--bd);background:var(--surf);padding:2.4rem;display:flex;flex-direction:column;overflow:hidden;position:relative}
.sc::before{content:'';position:absolute;top:0;right:0;width:260px;height:260px;background:radial-gradient(circle at top right,rgba(255,88,32,.09),transparent 65%);pointer-events:none}
.sc-wm{position:absolute;bottom:-1rem;right:-1rem;font-family:var(--fd);font-size:7rem;font-weight:800;color:rgba(255,255,255,.022);letter-spacing:-.05em;line-height:1;pointer-events:none;user-select:none}
.sc-hdr{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;margin-bottom:2rem;position:relative;z-index:1}
.sc-hdr-lbl{font-size:.65rem;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.28em;color:var(--a)}
.sc-status{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:.5rem;font-size:.65rem;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.15em;color:var(--a);padding:.3rem .8rem;border:1px solid var(--bdw);border-radius:100px;background:rgba(255,88,32,.06)}
.sc-dot{width:6px;height:6px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--a);animation:pulse 2s ease infinite;flex-shrink:0}
@keyframes pulse{0%,100%{box-shadow:0 0 0 0 rgba(255,88,32,.6)}50%{box-shadow:0 0 0 5px rgba(255,88,32,0)}}
/* 4 fixed columns — clock cell ALWAYS visible */
.sc-stats{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:1px;background:var(--bd);border-radius:12px;overflow:hidden;margin-bottom:2rem;position:relative;z-index:1}
.sc-stat{background:var(--surf2);padding:1.5rem 1rem;text-align:center}
.sc-sn{font-family:var(--fd);font-size:2rem;font-weight:800;letter-spacing:-.04em;color:var(--tx);line-height:1}
.sc-sn b{color:var(--a);font-size:1.1rem;font-weight:inherit}
.sc-sl{font-size:.62rem;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.12em;color:var(--txd);margin-top:.4rem}

.sc-rows{display:flex;flex-direction:column;position:relative;z-index:1}
.sc-row{display:grid;grid-template-columns:52px 1fr auto;align-items:center;gap:1.2rem;padding:1rem 0;border-bottom:1px solid var(--bd);transition:padding .3s var(--ease);position:relative;overflow:hidden}
.sc-row::before{content:'';position:absolute;top:0;left:-2.4rem;width:0;height:100%;background:rgba(255,88,32,.04);transition:width .4s var(--ease);z-index:-1}
.sc-row:last-child{border-bottom:none}
.sc-row:hover{padding-left:.6rem}
.sc-row:hover::before{width:calc(100% + 4.8rem)}
.sc-yr{font-family:var(--fd);font-size:.72rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--a)}
.sc-t{font-family:var(--fd);font-size:.92rem;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:-.02em;color:var(--tx);margin-bottom:.2rem}
.sc-o{font-size:.65rem;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.1em;color:var(--txs)}
.sc-ico{width:28px;height:28px;border-radius:50%;border:1px solid var(--bd);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:.8rem;flex-shrink:0;transition:border-color .3s,background .3s}
.sc-row:hover .sc-ico{border-color:var(--bdw);background:rgba(255,88,32,.08)}

/* EXPERIENCE */
.experience{padding:5vh 6% 10vh}
.sec-t{font-family:var(--fd);font-size:clamp(2rem,4vw,4rem);font-weight:800;letter-spacing:-.04em;line-height:1}
.sec-s{font-size:.78rem;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.2em;color:var(--txs);margin-bottom:1.5rem}
/* Row 1: 300px — Row 2: 420px (card 05 is taller to show certificate) */
.exp-grid{margin-top:4rem;display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(12,1fr);grid-template-rows:300px 420px;gap:1rem}

.ec{border:1px solid var(--bd);border-radius:16px;padding:2rem 2.2rem;position:relative;overflow:hidden;display:flex;flex-direction:column;justify-content:flex-end;transition:transform .5s var(--ease),border-color .4s,box-shadow .4s;background:var(--surf)}
.ec:hover{transform:translateY(-8px);border-color:var(--bdw);box-shadow:0 20px 60px rgba(0,0,0,.5),0 0 0 1px var(--bdw)}

.ec-bg{position:absolute;inset:0;z-index:0}
/* Brighter images: opacity .32 normal, .48 hover */
.ec-bg img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;object-position:center center;opacity:.32;transition:opacity .5s var(--ease);filter:saturate(.6) brightness(.8)}
.ec:hover .ec-bg img{opacity:.48}
/* Lighter gradient so images show clearly — dark only at bottom for text legibility */
.ec-bg::after{content:'';position:absolute;inset:0;background:linear-gradient(to top,rgba(5,5,8,.96) 0%,rgba(5,5,8,.5) 38%,rgba(5,5,8,.1) 100%)}

.ec-bg-logo img{object-fit:contain;object-position:center;background:rgba(255,255,255,.05);padding:1.5rem}

.ec::before{content:'';position:absolute;inset:0;z-index:1;background:radial-gradient(circle at top right,var(--glow),transparent 60%);opacity:0;transition:opacity .5s}
.ec:hover::before{opacity:1}

.e-num{position:absolute;top:2rem;left:2.2rem;font-family:var(--fd);font-size:.72rem;letter-spacing:.2em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--a);z-index:2}
.e-per{position:absolute;top:2rem;right:2.2rem;font-size:.68rem;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.1em;color:var(--txs);z-index:2}
.e-role{font-family:var(--fd);font-size:clamp(1.1rem,1.8vw,1.7rem);font-weight:700;letter-spacing:-.03em;margin-bottom:.4rem;position:relative;z-index:2;color:var(--tx)}
.e-co{font-size:.78rem;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.14em;color:var(--txs);position:relative;z-index:2}
.e-tag{position:absolute;bottom:2rem;right:2.2rem;padding:.3rem .8rem;border:1px solid var(--bd);border-radius:100px;font-size:.65rem;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.1em;color:var(--txd);z-index:2}

.ec1{grid-column:span 5}.ec2{grid-column:span 4}.ec3{grid-column:span 3}
.ec4{grid-column:span 4}.ec5{grid-column:span 8}

/* CONTACT */
.contact{padding:8vh 6% 10vh;position:relative;overflow:hidden}
.contact::after{content:'';position:absolute;bottom:-10%;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);width:900px;height:500px;background:radial-gradient(ellipse,rgba(255,88,32,.05),transparent 70%);pointer-events:none}
.c-hero{display:flex;align-items:flex-end;justify-content:space-between;padding-bottom:4rem;border-bottom:1px solid var(--bd);margin-bottom:3.5rem;gap:4rem}
.c-hl{font-family:var(--fd);font-size:clamp(3.5rem,7vw,8.5rem);font-weight:800;letter-spacing:-.06em;line-height:.85;text-transform:uppercase;flex-shrink:0}
.c-hl b{color:var(--a);font-weight:inherit}
.c-hr{max-width:300px;padding-bottom:.5rem}
.avail{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:.6rem;margin-bottom:1.4rem;padding:.45rem 1rem;background:rgba(255,88,32,.08);border:1px solid var(--bdw);border-radius:100px;font-size:.7rem;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.15em;color:var(--a)}
.avail-dot{width:6px;height:6px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--a);animation:pulse 2s ease infinite;flex-shrink:0}
.c-hr p{font-size:.92rem;line-height:1.8;color:var(--txs);text-align:justify}
.c-strip{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;padding:2.5rem 3rem;background:linear-gradient(120deg,rgba(255,88,32,.07),rgba(255,140,75,.03));border:1px solid var(--bdw);border-radius:20px;margin-bottom:1.2rem;gap:2rem;transition:transform .35s var(--ease),box-shadow .35s}
.c-strip:hover{transform:translateY(-5px);box-shadow:0 24px 60px rgba(255,88,32,.1)}
.ces-tag{font-size:.65rem;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.22em;color:var(--txd);margin-bottom:.6rem}
.ces-email{font-family:var(--fd);font-size:clamp(1.1rem,2.2vw,1.9rem);font-weight:800;letter-spacing:-.04em;color:var(--tx)}
.ces-email b{color:var(--a);font-weight:inherit}
.ces-btn{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:.8rem;padding:.9rem 2rem;background:var(--a);color:#fff;border-radius:100px;font-size:.8rem;font-weight:500;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.1em;white-space:nowrap;flex-shrink:0;transition:background .3s,box-shadow .3s}
.ces-btn:hover{background:var(--a2);box-shadow:0 8px 28px var(--glow)}
.ces-arr{font-size:1.1rem;display:inline-block;transition:transform .3s var(--ease)}
.c-strip:hover .ces-arr{transform:translateX(4px)}
.c-chs{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:1rem}
.ch{padding:1.8rem 2rem;background:var(--surf);border:1px solid var(--bd);border-radius:16px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;justify-content:space-between;min-height:130px;position:relative;overflow:hidden;transition:border-color .3s,background .3s,transform .35s var(--ease)}
.ch::before{content:'';position:absolute;bottom:0;left:0;width:100%;height:2px;background:linear-gradient(to right,var(--a),var(--a2));transform:scaleX(0);transform-origin:left;transition:transform .4s var(--ease)}
.ch:hover{border-color:var(--bdw);background:var(--surf2);transform:translateY(-6px)}
.ch:hover::before{transform:scaleX(1)}
.ch-top{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:flex-start}
.ch-plat{font-size:.65rem;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.2em;color:var(--txd)}
.ch-arr{width:32px;height:32px;border:1px solid var(--bd);border-radius:50%;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:.95rem;color:var(--txs);transition:background .3s,border-color .3s,color .3s,transform .3s var(--ease)}
.ch:hover .ch-arr{background:var(--a);border-color:var(--a);color:#fff;transform:rotate(45deg)}
.ch-val{font-family:var(--fd);font-size:1.05rem;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:-.02em;color:var(--tx);margin-top:auto;padding-top:1rem}
.c-quote{margin-top:3.5rem;padding-top:2.5rem;border-top:1px solid var(--bd);display:flex;justify-content:center}
.c-quote blockquote{max-width:560px;text-align:center;font-size:.9rem;font-style:italic;color:var(--txd);line-height:1.8}

footer{border-top:1px solid var(--bd);padding:2.5rem 6%;display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center}
.fl{font-family:var(--fd);font-size:1rem;font-weight:800;letter-spacing:-.05em;text-transform:uppercase}
.fl b{color:var(--a);font-weight:inherit}
.fm{font-size:.75rem;color:var(--txd);letter-spacing:.05em}
.fst{width:40px;height:40px;border:1px solid var(--bd);border-radius:50%;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:var(--txs);font-size:1rem;transition:border-color .3s,color .3s,transform .3s var(--ease)}
.fst:hover{border-color:var(--a);color:var(--a);transform:translateY(-3px)}

.rev{opacity:0;transform:translateY(40px);transition:opacity .9s var(--ease),transform .9s var(--ease)}
.rev.vis{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0)}

@media(max-width:960px){
  .hero-inner{grid-template-columns:1fr;gap:2rem;padding-top:6rem}
  .hero-right{flex-direction:row;justify-content:space-between;align-items:flex-end}
  .about{grid-template-columns:1fr;gap:3rem}
  .photo-frame{max-width:380px;margin:0 auto}
  .nav-links{display:none}
  .exp-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;grid-template-rows:auto}
  .ec1,.ec2,.ec3,.ec4,.ec5{grid-column:span 1;height:280px}
  .sc-stats{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr)}
  .c-hero{flex-direction:column;gap:2rem;padding-bottom:2.5rem;margin-bottom:2.5rem}
  .c-strip{flex-direction:column;align-items:flex-start;gap:1.5rem;padding:2rem}
  .c-chs{grid-template-columns:1fr}
  footer{flex-direction:column;gap:1.5rem;text-align:center}
}
@media(max-width:600px){
  .hero-name{font-size:clamp(3rem,13vw,4.8rem)}
  .exp-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}
  .ec1,.ec2,.ec3,.ec4,.ec5{grid-column:span 1;height:240px}
  .c-hl{font-size:3rem}
  .c-chs{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr}
}
</style>
</head>
<body>
<div class="grain" aria-hidden="true"></div>
<div class="cd" id="cd"></div>
<div class="cr" id="cr"></div>

<div class="loader">
  <div class="ld-inner"><span class="ld-line">CALCULATING <b>RISK.</b></span></div>
</div>

<nav id="nav">
  <a href="#" class="logo">Jonathan<b>.</b></a>
  <div class="nav-links">
    <a href="#about">About</a>
    <a href="#achievements">Achievements</a>
    <a href="#experience">Experience</a>
    <a href="#contact">Contact</a>
  </div>
  <a href="mailto:Jonathanivanhamdani1@gmail.com" class="nav-cta">Hire Me</a>
</nav>

<section class="hero" id="home">
  <div class="hbg"></div>
  <div class="hdots"></div>
  <div class="hgrid"></div>
  <div class="hhline"></div>
  <div class="hero-inner">
    <div class="hero-left">
      <div class="eyebrow">
        <div class="edot"></div>
        <span class="etxt">Actuarial Science &middot; Universitas Brawijaya</span>
      </div>
      <h1 class="hero-name">
        <div class="hn"><span>Jonathan</span></div>
        <div class="hn"><span>Ivan</span></div>
        <div class="hn"><span>Hamdani</span></div>
      </h1>
      <p class="hero-desc">Actuarial Science student applying a <strong>data-driven approach</strong> to every business decision. I measure risk, build strategies, and create tangible impact.</p>
      <div class="hero-actions">
        <a href="#about" class="btn-p">View Journey</a>
        <a href="#contact" class="btn-g">Get in Touch</a>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="hero-right">
      <div class="hero-badge">
        <div class="badge-v">#2</div>
        <div class="badge-l">PKM Champion Cup 2026</div>
      </div>
      <div class="hero-stats">
        <div><div class="sv">5<b>+</b></div><div class="sl">Roles</div></div>
        <div><div class="sv">5<b>x</b></div><div class="sl">Medals</div></div>
        <div><div class="sv">1<b>st</b></div><div class="sl">Year</div></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="hero-scroll"><div class="hs-line"></div><span class="hs-txt">Scroll</span></div>
</section>

<div class="mband" aria-hidden="true">
  <div class="mtrack">
    <span class="mitem">Actuarial Science</span><span class="mitem">Business Strategy</span>
    <span class="mitem">Data Analytics</span><span class="mitem">Google Ads Certified</span>
    <span class="mitem">Risk Assessment</span><span class="mitem">Leadership</span>
    <span class="mitem">Business Dev</span><span class="mitem">Actuarial Science</span>
    <span class="mitem">Business Strategy</span><span class="mitem">Data Analytics</span>
    <span class="mitem">Google Ads Certified</span><span class="mitem">Risk Assessment</span>
    <span class="mitem">Leadership</span><span class="mitem">Business Dev</span>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="div-n rev">
  <span class="div-n-num">01 /</span>
  <div class="div-n-line"></div>
  <span class="div-n-lbl">About</span>
</div>

<section class="about" id="about">
  <div class="photo-wrap rev">
    <div class="photo-frame">      <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Jonathan Ivan Hamdani" class="photo-img">    </div>
    <div class="photo-badge">
      <div class="pb-v">Juara 2</div>
      <div class="pb-l">PKM RSH3 &middot; 2026</div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="rev" style="transition-delay:.15s">
    <div class="about-tag">Who I Am</div>
    <h2 class="about-h">The Calculus of <b>Success</b><br>starts here.</h2>
    <p class="about-body">I am a first-year Actuarial Science student at Universitas Brawijaya. My approach to business and study is rooted in <strong>precision, risk assessment, and unwavering accountability</strong> under pressure.<br><br>Beyond theoretical mathematics, I apply an analytical mindset to real-world business development. I view my university years as a golden era to test hypotheses, lead initiatives, and deliver consistent, measurable results.</p>
    <div class="pills">
      <span class="pill">Actuarial Science</span>
      <span class="pill">Business Dev</span>
      <span class="pill">Google Ads</span>
      <span class="pill">Strategy</span>
      <span class="pill">Leadership</span>
      <span class="pill">Data Analytics</span>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<div class="div-n rev">
  <span class="div-n-num">02 /</span>
  <div class="div-n-line"></div>
  <span class="div-n-lbl">Achievements</span>
</div>

<section id="achievements" style="scroll-margin-top:80px">
  <div class="ach-section">
    <div class="sc rev">
      <div class="sc-wm">JIH</div>
      <div class="sc-hdr">
        <span class="sc-hdr-lbl">Achievement Highlights</span>
        <span class="sc-status"><div class="sc-dot"></div>Active &middot; 2023&ndash;2026</span>
      </div>
      <div class="sc-stats">
        <div class="sc-stat">
          <div class="sc-sn">5<b>+</b></div>
          <div class="sc-sl">Roles</div>
        </div>
        <div class="sc-stat">
          <div class="sc-sn">5<b>x</b></div>
          <div class="sc-sl">Medals</div>
        </div>
        <div class="sc-stat">
          <div class="sc-sn">1<b>st</b></div>
          <div class="sc-sl">Year</div>
        </div>
        <div class="sc-stat">
          <div class="sc-sn">2<b>x</b></div>
          <div class="sc-sl">Nat&#39;l Medals</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="sc-rows">
        <div class="sc-row">
          <span class="sc-yr">2026</span>
          <div><div class="sc-t">2nd Place &mdash; PKM RSH3</div><div class="sc-o">PKM Champion Cup &middot; Universitas Brawijaya</div></div>
          <div class="sc-ico">&#x1F948;</div>
        </div>
        <div class="sc-row">
          <span class="sc-yr">2025</span>
          <div><div class="sc-t">1st Place &mdash; Basketball</div><div class="sc-o">UAKKAT Competition &middot; Universitas Brawijaya</div></div>
          <div class="sc-ico">&#x1F3C6;</div>
        </div>
        <div class="sc-row">
          <span class="sc-yr">2024</span>
          <div><div class="sc-t">Gold Medal &mdash; Biology</div><div class="sc-o">POSN &middot; Pekan Olimpiade Sains Nasional</div></div>
          <div class="sc-ico">&#x1F947;</div>
        </div>
        <div class="sc-row">
          <span class="sc-yr">2024</span>
          <div><div class="sc-t">Silver Medal &mdash; Indonesian Language</div><div class="sc-o">ONSB &middot; Olimpiade Nasional Sains dan Bahasa</div></div>
          <div class="sc-ico">&#x1F948;</div>
        </div>
        <div class="sc-row">
          <span class="sc-yr">2023</span>
          <div><div class="sc-t">Silver Award &mdash; Indonesian Language</div><div class="sc-o">Lembaga Prestasi Pelajar &amp; FISIP UI</div></div>
          <div class="sc-ico">&#x1F3C5;</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<div class="div-s rev">
  <div class="dsm"><span></span><span></span><span></span></div>
  <span class="div-s-txt">03 / Professional Trajectory</span>
  <div class="div-s-line"></div>
</div>

<section class="experience" id="experience" style="scroll-margin-top:80px">
  <div class="rev">
    <div class="sec-s">Career Milestones</div>
    <h2 class="sec-t">A Measured<br>Track Record.</h2>
  </div>
  <div class="exp-grid">

    <div class="ec ec1 rev" style="transition-delay:.05s">
      <div class="ec-bg">        <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Brand RingTime">      </div>
      <div class="e-num">01</div>
      <div class="e-per">Jun 2025 &ndash; Present</div>
      <h3 class="e-role">Co-Founder &amp; CFO</h3>
      <span class="e-co">Brand RingTime</span>
      <span class="e-tag">Founder</span>
    </div>

    <div class="ec ec2 rev" style="transition-delay:.1s">
      <div class="ec-bg">        <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Corponation Group">      </div>
      <div class="e-num">02</div>
      <div class="e-per">Nov 2025 &ndash; Jan 2026</div>
      <h3 class="e-role">Business Dev Intern</h3>
      <span class="e-co">Corponation Group</span>
      <span class="e-tag">Internship</span>
    </div>

    <div class="ec ec3 rev" style="transition-delay:.15s">
      <div class="ec-bg ec-bg-logo">        <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="BEM FMIPA UB">      </div>
      <div class="e-num">03</div>
      <div class="e-per">Oct &ndash; Dec 2025</div>
      <h3 class="e-role">Strategic Staff</h3>
      <span class="e-co">BEM FMIPA UB</span>
      <span class="e-tag">Org</span>
    </div>

    <div class="ec ec4 rev" style="transition-delay:.2s">
      <div class="ec-bg">        <img src="data:image/webp;base64," alt="Accounting">      </div>
      <div class="e-num">04</div>
      <div class="e-per">May &ndash; Jul 2025</div>
      <h3 class="e-role">Accountant Assistant</h3>
      <span class="e-co">PT. Sanjaya Teknik Perkasa</span>
      <span class="e-tag">Finance</span>
    </div>

    <div class="ec ec5 rev" style="transition-delay:.25s">
      <div class="ec-bg">        <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Basketball" style="object-position:center 50%">      </div>
      <div class="e-num">05</div>
      <div class="e-per">2024 &ndash; 2025</div>
      <h3 class="e-role">Head of Basketball Extracurricular</h3>
      <span class="e-co">SMA Dharma Karya UT</span>
      <span class="e-tag">Leadership</span>
    </div>

  </div>
</section>

<div class="div-glow"></div>

<section class="contact" id="contact" style="scroll-margin-top:80px">
  <div class="c-hero rev">
    <h2 class="c-hl">Let&apos;s<br><b>Work</b><br>Together.</h2>
    <div class="c-hr">
      <div class="avail"><div class="avail-dot"></div>Available for opportunities</div>
      <p>Open to internships, project collaborations, and discussions around business and actuarial science. Reach out and let&apos;s build something worth calculating.</p>
    </div>
  </div>
  <a href="mailto:Jonathanivanhamdani1@gmail.com" class="c-strip rev">
    <div>
      <div class="ces-tag">Primary Email</div>
      <div class="ces-email">jonathanivanhamdani1<b>@gmail.com</b></div>
    </div>
    <div class="ces-btn">Send a Message <span class="ces-arr">&#8594;</span></div>
  </a>
  <div class="c-chs rev" style="transition-delay:.1s">
    <a href="https://instagram.com/Jonathanivanth" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="ch">
      <div class="ch-top"><span class="ch-plat">Instagram</span><div class="ch-arr">&#8599;</div></div>
      <div class="ch-val">@Jonathanivanth</div>
    </a>
    <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/jonathan-ivan-hamdani-61a39a239/" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="ch">
      <div class="ch-top"><span class="ch-plat">LinkedIn</span><div class="ch-arr">&#8599;</div></div>
      <div class="ch-val">Jonathan Ivan Hamdani</div>
    </a>
    <a href="https://ub.ac.id" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="ch">
      <div class="ch-top"><span class="ch-plat">Institution</span><div class="ch-arr">&#8599;</div></div>
      <div class="ch-val">Universitas Brawijaya</div>
    </a>
  </div>
  <div class="c-quote rev" style="transition-delay:.2s">
    <blockquote>&ldquo;Every great achievement begins with a calculated risk and a simple conversation.&rdquo;</blockquote>
  </div>
</section>

<footer>
  <div class="fl">Jonathan<b>.</b></div>
  <div class="fm">&copy; 2026 Jonathan Ivan Hamdani &middot; Engineered with precision.</div>
  <a href="#home" class="fst" aria-label="Back to top">&#8593;</a>
</footer>

<script>
(function(){
  // Custom cursor
  var cd=document.getElementById('cd'),cr=document.getElementById('cr');
  var mx=0,my=0,rx=0,ry=0;
  document.addEventListener('mousemove',function(e){mx=e.clientX;my=e.clientY});
  (function tick(){
    cd.style.left=mx+'px';cd.style.top=my+'px';
    rx+=(mx-rx)*.12;ry+=(my-ry)*.12;
    cr.style.left=rx+'px';cr.style.top=ry+'px';
    requestAnimationFrame(tick);
  })();
  document.querySelectorAll('a,button,.pill').forEach(function(el){
    el.addEventListener('mouseenter',function(){document.body.classList.add('hov')});
    el.addEventListener('mouseleave',function(){document.body.classList.remove('hov')});
  });

  // Nav pin on scroll
  var nav=document.getElementById('nav');
  window.addEventListener('scroll',function(){nav.classList.toggle('pin',window.scrollY>60)},{passive:true});

  // Scroll reveal
  var io=new IntersectionObserver(function(entries){
    entries.forEach(function(e){if(e.isIntersecting){e.target.classList.add('vis');io.unobserve(e.target)}});
  },{threshold:0.1});
  document.querySelectorAll('.rev').forEach(function(el){io.observe(el)});


})();
</script>
</body>
</html>
